steps.t: Yonder-watch supplies can be found at the secret store-hole in the woods between Gamwich and Long Cleeve. You should carry Yonder-watch supplies to a …
A Bounder of the Yonder-watch can be found in Long Cleeve. You should talk to Bounder Tudge in Long Cleeve.
Bill Ferny can be found near Long Cleeve in the Yondershire. You should confront Bill Ferny.
A secret Yonder-watch store-hole can be found in the woods between Gamwich and Long Cleeve. You should talk to Fredegar Bolger at the store-hole.
